findings.description: E2E: 4x page.waitForTimeout (300ms, 3x 500ms) used for hydration/settle. Prefer waitForSelector or network idle instead.
CustomTooltip uses `any` type for recharts payload props. Define a proper TooltipPayload interface.
AnyResponsiveGridLayout = React.ComponentType<any> — weak typing for dynamically-imported grid component.
MetricsRange type missing '30d' option which the backend timeRangeSchema supports.

fixes_verified.evidence: tests/e2e/m-p3-features.spec.ts — 9 tests covering M-P3-002 (metrics/TimeRangeSelector), M-P3-003 (InlineAiTrigger/Panel), M-P3-004 (dashboard customize). Uses BASE_URL, no localhost.

fixes_verified.issue: Missing type='button' on TimeRangeSelector, AutoRefreshToggle, NodeResourceBreakdown
fixes_verified.evidence: All buttons confirmed with type='button' at correct lines.
role='dialog', aria-modal='true', aria-labelledby, focus trap on Tab/Shift+Tab, auto-focus on open — all present.
role='dialog', aria-modal='true', aria-label='Widget Library', Escape handler, focus trap — all present.
useRef for contextType/contextData/clusterId + useCallback wrapping askQuestion — stale closure eliminated.
crypto.randomUUID() at dashboard-layout.ts:150 — no more counter.
isWidget() and isLayoutItem() runtime guards at lines 192-213 — malformed data filtered, not cast.

positives: All 6 MEDIUM blocking issues from v189 initial review fully resolved
E2E spec uses BASE_URL env var — no localhost hardcoding
Focus trap implementation is correct and idiomatic (Tab/Shift+Tab wrapping)
crypto.randomUUID() is the right approach for collision-free widget IDs
Type guards in applyServerLayout properly narrow unknown → Widget/LayoutItem
useCallback + useRef pattern for InlineAiPanel correctly solves stale closure
E2E tests handle data-conditional flows gracefully (skip when no anomalies)
